name: Onion Herb Pizza
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 6
DOUGH
Proof yeast, warm water and sugar. Put 1 3/4 cups of flour in processor, start, add 3 tbsp olive oil, add yeast mixture, add remaining 1 3/4 cups flour. Continue processing to make a soft pliable dough. Spread on oiled pan, prick well.
Saute onions in olive oil until brown but not burned. Add garlic. Add vinegar, rosemary and parmesan cheese. Spread mixture over dough.
Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until crust is browned.
